examples: The visitor may then be struck by the strangeness of seeing such diverse paintings, drawings and sculptures brought together in an environment for which they were not originally created.
He gave many people the impression of low energy, strangeness, and lawlessness.
And this is especially true for strangeness.
Dorst is at risk because he has gone so far into strangeness that it incapacitates him.
The words I had always used had a new sheen of strangeness to them.
